title: Do robots need bodies? UMSI researchers say it depends
description: UMSI researchers challenge the assumption that virtual robot representations yield the same human responses as physically present robots, arguing the field should focus on when virtual alternatives are appropriate.

image.alt: A simulated warehouse environment shows a red robotic arm picking boxes from shelves above a control console with a serial-number display, score and timer monitors, and red, blue, and green buttons used by a human operator.
